content.en:
At the beginning, many forces didn't know what the boundary stone was, but in order to deliberately block the Black Wind Mountain, the Upper Triple Heaven forces explained the usefulness and value of the boundary stone.

Suddenly, countless forces went crazy, and they also secretly scolded the Dark God Temple for being stupid, guarding the boundary stone for countless years, but they didn't know the use of the boundary stone.

Otherwise, after so many years of controlling the corpses of the realm beasts in the Dark Temple, a group of Dao Ancestors would have been cultivated by using the boundary stones.

And the corpse of the boundary beast has once again been targeted by countless forces, because the corpse of the boundary beast can also give birth to the boundary stone, unless the origin of the corpse of the boundary beast is exhausted.

However, it will take a long time for the origin of a Realm Beast corpse to escape, so there is no need to worry about it at this time.

Therefore, the value of a realm beast corpse is still very large.

However, the four transcendent forces and many top forces have occupied the corpse of the realm beast, and at present, other forces cannot participate in it at all, unless all the forces of the other realms recover.

Then, when the time comes, the question of the ownership of the corpse of the boundary beast will change.

......

Void and innocent country.

The true ancestors of the Void Heaven Hall were very excited when they learned that the Liuli Sect had been destroyed.

The Liuli Sect has an enmity with the Void Heaven True Kingdom, and the True Ancestors of the Void Heaven True Kingdom are often worried that when they go out, they will be attacked by the True Ancestors of the Void Heaven Sect.

At present, the Void Heaven True Kingdom only relies on Ye Tian to deter the Liuli Sect, but if the Liuli Sect sneaks up, the entire Void Heaven True Kingdom will have no ability to save their lives except for Ye Tian.

Now that the Liuli Sect has been destroyed, and the true ancestors of the Dark God Temple are almost dead, they naturally don't have to worry, how can they not be excited?

Not long after Ye Tian returned to the Void Heaven True Kingdom, a True Ancestor came to visit Ye Tian.

If an ordinary True Ancestor came to visit, Ye Tianda would not be able to see it, but this True Ancestor was not an ordinary True Ancestor, but a Supreme True Ancestor, and he came from the Zixia Sect, one of the forces of the Upper Three Heavens.

The Zixia Sect is an authentic Sevenfold Heaven force, but it is not comparable to a force like the Liuli Sect.

And the True Ancestor who arrived was a supreme True Ancestor of the Zixia Sect, named Huangguang True Ancestor!

"Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, be polite!"

Huangguang True Ancestor bent down and said.

"Why did the Yellow Light True Ancestor come to me?" Ye Tian asked.

He believed that it was definitely not a trivial matter for Huang Guang True Ancestor to come to him, otherwise he would not have had to come in person.

"I want to buy the boundary stone in the hands of the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor!" Huang Guang True Ancestor said directly.

"Boundary Stone, what boundary stone do I have in my hand?"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

"There is no need to deny it!" Huang Guang True Ancestor said, "Some of the Middle Triple Heaven Forces don't know your identity, but most of the Upper Triple Heaven Forces know your identity. As a general of the Black Wind Mountain, this time I participated in the battle of the Liuli Sect to exterminate it, and you said that you didn't have a boundary stone on you, I don't believe it!"

Ye Tian actually knew that his identity would definitely be known by those Upper Triple Heaven forces, because his whereabouts were easy to find.

Moreover, the bloody general had also told him, and many of the Upper Triple Heaven forces knew his identity.

At the beginning, he had obtained three records of the Ancient Realm, and some True Ancestors of the Upper Triple Heaven Forces wanted to kill him, but they were warned by the Bloody General.

Therefore, the fact that he joined the Black Wind Mountain is not a secret.

"I only have a few boundary stones in my hands, and I can't trade them!"

Ye Tian said.

"Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, why bother, it doesn't matter if you trade a few pieces, and you can get a lot of resources, which is good for you and me......!"

Huang Guang True Ancestor's voice gradually became cold, and the threat was obvious.

"Oh, how else?"

Ye Tian didn't care about Dao at all.

"Otherwise, you will have one more enemy, or even an enemy of our Purple Xia Sect!"

Huang Guang True Ancestor directly threatened.

"Then be the enemy, could it be that your Zixia Sect is even more powerful than our Black Wind Mountain, dare to threaten me, you don't have this qualification!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"You ......"

Huang Guang True Ancestor was furious.

He didn't take Ye Tian as a native in his eyes at all before, thinking that Ye Tian was just a little more talented, and he was valued by Black Wind Mountain to cultivate to the current realm.

If he can also obtain a few boundary stones, he can raise his comprehension talent to the super god level, and he can also raise several other special talents to the super god level.

At that time, he will also be able to impact the top Supreme True Ancestor, and he is even expected to impact the Invincible True Ancestor.

But Ye Tian actually refused to trade, which made him very angry!

"Ten Thousand True Ancestors, what the True Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain are most afraid of is that their identities will be exposed, after all, Black Wind Mountain can't really send a large number of True Ancestors to protect you alone. Black Wind Mountain is different from our sect's forces, and our sect's forces are more united, so if you are our enemy, you will really die!"

Huang Guang True Ancestor threatened again.

"If you don't go, then don't go!"

Ye Tian mobilized the power of his territory, and he held the forbidden spear in his hand.

Now, his forbidden body has been tempered to twenty percent, and its power is much more terrifying than it was at the beginning, and the condensed forbidden spear is naturally even more terrifying.

Looking at Ye Tian's forbidden spear, and then feeling the pressure transmitted from the void, the Yellow Light True Ancestor was also a little afraid.

After all, this is not his home field, if a large number of True Ancestors of the Void Heaven Vein join forces to urge the formation, they can really keep him.

He can't compete with a true country on his own, even if he is an invincible true ancestor, he may not be able to compete with a true country, and sometimes the number of people can really make up for the difference in strength.

"Humph!"

Huangguang True Ancestor snorted coldly and turned to leave.

Looking at the vanished Yellow Light True Ancestor, Ye Tian's face was also very gloomy.

"If I have the strength of an invincible True Ancestor, which Supreme True Ancestor would dare to threaten me casually?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In the final analysis, it is still a matter of strength.

The Supreme True Ancestor was indeed a top-notch existence for the Lower Triple Heaven Force and the Middle Triple Heaven Force, which was enough to deter them, but it was difficult to deter the Upper Triple Heaven Force.

Any Upper Triple Heaven Force has at least dozens of Supreme True Ancestors, and some forces have more Supreme True Ancestors than Black Wind Mountain, at least reaching hundreds, and even several Invincible True Ancestors.

Therefore, a supreme true ancestor like Ye Tian is really nothing.

After the Yellow Light True Ancestor returned to the Zixia Sect, he really wanted to unite with the other Supreme True Ancestors to deal with Ye Tian, but the other True Ancestors didn't want to really offend the Black Wind Mountain, after all, although the Black Wind Mountain may not be united, the key is to kill their people, maybe they will rob you in the future.

This kind of thing, Black Wind Mountain has done more than once or twice.

If you can, you can't offend, the key Ye Tian is also very talented, and he has mastered the power of the dark taboo, so he will definitely be a big guy in the future.

If you can't kill it, you'll be in trouble.

Huangguang True Ancestor is stupid, and other True Ancestors are not stupid.

And just like that, the matter came to an end for the time being.

Later, there were also some True Ancestors who sent a message to Ye Tian, wanting to buy boundary stones, but Ye Tian rejected them one by one.

In a flash, decades passed.

Ye Tian used the boundary stone in his hand to cultivate a group of demonic geniuses of his own in the Nine Extremes Space, each of which had a super-god-level comprehension talent, plus at least one special talent.

With enough talent and resources, they will naturally grow up very quickly.

At the beginning, those geniuses were basically at the level of god generals and heavenly monarchs.

Now, they are basically at the True Monarch level, and a few of them have reached the half-step True Ancestor level.

At this rate, it would not be difficult for Ye Tian to give birth to a group of True Ancestor Legions in the future.

In fact, many generals have a group of True Ancestor Legions under their commands, with at least thousands or even thousands, while the True Ancestor Legions under the command of the Bloody General are at least tens of thousands.

Of course, this is talking about the past, something that has not yet been broken in the domain realm.

But now, a large number of True Ancestors in Black Wind Mountain have fallen, and countless legions have fallen, which naturally cannot be compared with the peak time.

However, as long as the generals are willing, they will naturally be able to cultivate a group of True Ancestor Legions.

At that time, some small things can be completely handed over to the legion to do, and you can retreat and cultivate by yourself with peace of mind.

this day.

During Ye Tian's retreat, he sensed that something on his body was vibrating.

"What's that?"

Ye Tian searched for the universe in his body and finally found it.

"It's the cold jade coffin!"

Ye Tian was surprised.
